lanes.title: Review Check Lane
verificationPrompts: Call out exact files or evidence for each finding.
Separate verified issues from suspected gaps.
Name the smallest useful follow-up test.

lanes.title: Debug Check Lane
verificationPrompts: State the repro or best available evidence.
Name what changed and how the repro was rechecked.
List remaining uncertainty if full repro was not possible.

lanes.title: Release Check Lane
verificationPrompts: Include rollout owner or monitoring expectation when known.
Name rollback trigger or decision point.

lanes.title: Migration Check Lane
verificationPrompts: Add a verification step for each risky transition.
Explain compatibility window and coexistence assumptions.
Call out rollback point before irreversible steps.
